items.desc_en: Here are some of the companies making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 以下是一些在午盘交易中成为头条新闻的公司。

items.title_en: Ghana delays visit by South African president amid row over anti-migrant protests
items.title_zh: 加纳因反移民抗议活动而推迟南非总统的访问
items.desc_en: Many in Ghana feared his presence would lead to mass protests, and officials say it is postponed for now.
items.desc_zh: 加纳许多人担心他的出现会引发大规模抗议，官员们表示目前已推迟。

items.title_en: Don't rely on AI for personal finance advice, study finds
items.title_zh: 研究发现不要依赖人工智能提供个人理财建议
items.desc_en: Researchers who studied generative AI platforms found that personal finance recommendations could be inconsistent or biased.
items.desc_zh: 研究生成式人工智能平台的研究人员发现，个人理财建议可能不一致或存在偏见。

items.title_en: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
items.title_zh: 特朗普在北约峰会上重申格陵兰岛威胁，称美国可能从欧洲撤军
items.desc_en: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.
items.desc_zh: 今年早些时候，由于特朗普要求美国必须以国家安全为由控制格陵兰岛，北约陷入了危机。

items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡：美国称伊朗在 24 小时内袭击了三艘船只 - Axios

items.title_en: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
items.title_zh: 律师称被拘留的加沙医生在以色列监狱中遭到毒打
items.desc_en: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.
items.desc_zh: 胡萨姆·阿布·萨菲亚 (Hussam Abu Safiya) 博士的律师告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，他的委托人在上周拜访时被殴打得很严重，以至于他都认不出他了。

items.title_en: Cramer says 'everything still revolves around Nvidia' despite its lagging stock
items.title_zh: 克莱默表示，尽管英伟达股价落后，但“一切仍以英伟达为中心”
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that Nvidia remains at the center of the artificial intelligence boom.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，英伟达仍然处于人工智能热潮的中心。

items.title_en: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞被判有罪，但如果她佩戴标签，法院将为她竞选总统扫清道路
items.desc_en: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.
items.desc_zh: 全国集会领袖现在必须决定是否携带电子标签参加竞选，并稍后在电视上发表讲话。

items.title_en: Stellantis to sell small Fiat Topolino EV for $13,995 in U.S.
items.title_zh: Stellantis 将以 13,995 美元的价格在美国出售小型菲亚特 Topolino EV
items.desc_en: While the Topolino resembles a small car such as the Fiat 500, the EV is actually a quadricycle that functions more like a golf cart.
items.desc_zh: 虽然 Topolino 类似于菲亚特 500 等小型汽车，但电动汽车实际上是一辆四轮车，其功能更像高尔夫球车。

items.title_en: AI startup CEO pleaded guilty in U.S. to trading on insider tips from lawyers
items.title_zh: 人工智能初创公司首席执行官在美国认罪，承认利用律师的内幕消息进行交易
items.desc_en: Court records unsealed Monday show that Arya Bolurfrushan, founder of Abu Dhabi-based AppliedAI, pleaded guilty last year in ‌a deal with prosecutors in Boston.
items.desc_zh: 周一公布的法庭记录显示，总部位于阿布扎比的 AppliedAI 创始人 Arya Bolurfrushan 去年在与波士顿检察官的一项协议中认罪。

items.title_zh: 特朗普盟友奈杰尔·法拉奇因财务丑闻退出英国议会以对抗特别选举
items.desc_en: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.

items.title_en: Amazon raising at least $25 billion in bond sale, won't issue more debt in 2026
items.title_zh: 亚马逊通过债券发行筹集至少250亿美元，2026年不会发行更多债券
items.desc_en: It marks Amazon's latest debt raise as it looks to buttress its massive investments in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 这标志着亚马逊最近一次举债，以支持其在人工智能领域的大规模投资。

items.title_en: Rivian stock falls more than 10% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
items.title_zh: Rivian 出售 7500 万股以筹集资金，股价下跌超过 10%
items.desc_en: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.
items.desc_zh: 此次融资发生在延长交易时段，Rivian 股价继上周上涨 19.2% 后，周一上涨 8.1%。

items.desc_en: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

items.title_en: George E. Johnson, founder of pioneering Black hair products company, dead at 99
items.title_zh: 黑发产品先驱公司创始人乔治·E·约翰逊 (George E. Johnson) 去世，享年 99 岁
items.desc_en: George E. Johnson, the pioneering Chicago entrepreneur whose eponymous company transformed Black hair care in the U.S. died on Monday at age 99.
items.desc_zh: 芝加哥企业家先驱乔治·E·约翰逊 (George E. Johnson) 周一去世，享年 99 岁，他的同名公司彻底改变了美国的黑人护发业。

items.title_zh: 涉嫌摩纳哥炸弹袭击的妇女在乌克兰被发现死亡
items.desc_en: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

items.title_zh: 中国因受贿3.25亿美元判处官员死刑

items.desc_zh: 法庭获悉，这位 69 岁的老人帮助公司获得了有价值的合同以换取金钱。

items.title_en: Trump heads to Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
items.title_zh: 特朗普前往土耳其，北约因俄罗斯袭击而紧张，美国不耐烦
items.desc_en: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.

items.desc_en: 1.6T MoE trained entirely on AI ASICs
items.desc_zh: 1.6T MoE 完全基于 AI ASIC 进行训练

items.title_en: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
items.title_zh: 丰田将投资 36 亿美元将塔科马皮卡生产从墨西哥转移到德克萨斯州
items.desc_en: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.
items.desc_zh: 丰田表示，将投资 36 亿美元将塔科马中型皮卡车的生产从墨西哥转移到德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥制造园区。

items.title_en: Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder
items.title_zh: 查理·柯克的家人出席被指控谋杀的嫌疑人的听证会
items.desc_en: Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA.
items.desc_zh: 23 岁的泰勒·罗宾逊 (Tyler Robinson) 被指控谋杀了特朗普的重要盟友、青年组织“美国转折点”的创始人柯克。

items.title_en: Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court
items.title_zh: 奥地利法院判定前叙利亚情报局长犯有酷刑和性虐待罪
items.desc_en: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad
items.desc_zh: 两名前叙利亚官员在奥地利维也纳接受审判，被控对叙利亚前领导人巴沙尔·阿萨德的反对者犯有罪行

items.title_en: Kadoink
items.title_zh: Kadoink
items.desc_en: Gather people instantly by ringing their phones directly
items.desc_zh: 直接拨打电话即可立即聚集人员

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.title_zh: 特朗普证实他要求国际足联审查巴洛贡禁令
items.desc_en: United States President Donald Trump says Fifa "made the right decision" to suspend Folarin Balogun's one-match ban, adding that otherwise, it would have left a "big stain" on the World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，国际足联暂停对福拉林·巴洛贡的一场比赛禁令“做出了正确的决定”，并补充说，否则，这将给世界杯留下“巨大污点”。

items.title_en: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
items.title_zh: 法国南部山火迫使10,000人疏散
items.desc_en: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.
items.desc_zh: 由于野火袭击东比利牛斯地区，环法自行车赛组织者禁止观众观看第三赛段。

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.desc_zh: 人工智能为您提供客户服务

items.desc_zh: 记录一次，放心发送

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.desc_en: Fewer tokens, same context, 50% cost reduction
items.desc_zh: 更少的代币，相同的上下文，成本降低 50%

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。
